sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97737" key="sugkatayeu/domai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκατα-ψεύδομαι</orth>, <sense id="n97737.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">join in a lie against.</tr_> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινος</itype> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg002.perseus-grc1:158" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.158</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
